title: athyrium × akiense
intro: Athyrium × akiense, also known as Akiense Japanese fern, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the Athyrium genus, belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Athyrium × akiense include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a useful treatment for various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas or infusions, which can be used to treat minor injuries and skin irritations.
